prompt: Use reference image. A high-fashion cinematic desert editorial shoot in Vogue style featuring the same bearded male supermodel with long windswept hair and refined masculine elegance. He wears luxury Bedouin-inspired couture with embroidered silk layers, flowing desert coats, and subtle metallic accents. Warm golden-hour lighting with soft pastel sky gradients, ultra-luxury aesthetic, wind-filled desert atmosphere. Panel 1 – Striding Runway Pose: Full-body shot of the model walking confidently across desert dunes like a runway, coat flowing dramatically in the wind, strong forward motion, heroic silhouette. Panel 2 – Standing Hero Pose: The model stands still on a dune peak, slightly turned sideways, one hand adjusting his flowing coat, intense calm expression, wind catching hair and fabric. Panel 3 – Close-Up Emotion Shot: Tight cinematic close-up focusing on expressive eyes, detailed beard texture, wind particles in the air, soft golden light highlighting facial structure and skin glow. Panel 4 – Dynamic Movement Pose: Mid-action pose with the model turning through the wind, fabric swirling around him, sand particles frozen in motion, dramatic editorial energy like a luxury fashion film still. Overall Style: ultra-cinematic Vogue editorial, soft golden lighting, pastel sky gradient, high-end fashion photography, 1:1 aspect ratio, ultra-detailed, luxury aesthetic.
